title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 18 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 18 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 18 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/10/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to drop today, main contract closed 711, a decrease of 2.27% throughout the day. The spot quotation in themorning decreased by around 20-30 yuan/mt from last Friday. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see due to decreasing iron ore price, and the purchasing enthusiasm was not higher than expected.
